text: Stepping into this space, everything feels imbued with anticipation and curiosity—the atmosphere is awash in electric blue and orange, colors that evoke both creativity and analysis. The label 'R+D' makes me reflect on my own perpetual state of inquiry, my urge to explore and understand. Surrounded by the language of research and development, I am made aware of the delicate dance between thought and action, between observation and innovation. I feel alive to possibility here—energized yet contemplative, ready to engage.
